race.comment: A race featuring a mix of race experience and interesting newcomers. THYME TO GO (14) has improved with each run this preparation, finishing second at Wyong over 1100m after missing the start, and looks ready to peak third-up. PISTOLEER (15) caught the eye on debut at Newcastle, overcoming trouble in running before closing well into third and should appreciate the rise to 1000m. Debutants KILLA (3) and ACKNOWLEDGE ME (8) have both shown promise at the trials, the former from the Tulloch Lodge yard and the latter a recent Kembla trial runner-up. Both warrant close attention.
